## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns accounting, artificial intelligence, branding during Ideation, Growth, Recovery and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- ## What this process covers
- ## BOSS use
- Route to this process when the user needs deeper expertise after basic advising:
- Accounting, bookkeeping, QuickBooks, contracts.
- Cybersecurity, business continuity, insurance standards.
- Human resources and compliance.
- Marketing, branding, LinkedIn, SEO, pitches, growth evaluation, or AI productivity.

## People and links

## Next handoff

Open the cited source link when available and route follow-up to Small Business Development Center (SBDC) or the named qualified resource.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
